questions.question: Which among the following fishes does not have Central Nervous System?
questions.explanation: Jellyfish and sea jellies are the informal common names given to the medusa-phase of certain gelatinous members of the sub-phylum Medusozoa. Jellyfish do not have specialized systems for osmoregulation, respiration and circulation, and do not have a central nervous system.

questions.question: Which among following is not a Fish?
questions.explanation: Cuttlefish or cuttles are marine molluscs of the order Sepiida. related to the octopus and squid and characterized by a thick internal calcified shell called the cuttlebone.

questions.question: Zebrafish, which has been genetically modified in Glofish to be sold as a pet is native to which among the following countries?
questions.explanation: The zebrafish is a freshwater fish belonging to the minnow family. It is native to South Asia, it is a popular aquarium fish, frequently sold under the trade name zebra danio. It belongs to India and Sri Lanka.

questions.question: Which among the following is a Mollusc?
questions.explanation: Cuttle fish or cuttles are marine molluscs of the order Sepiida. Molluscs are an important phylum of invertebrate animals. It is the second-largest phylum of invertebrate animals after the Arthropoda.

questions.question: Biologists have been able to demonstrate the hearing and sound sensory mechanism through the acoustico-lateralis system in which of the following vertebrates ?
questions.explanation: Biologists have been able to demonstrate the hearing and sound sensory mechanism through the acoustico-lateralis system in fishes.
